final:
// // This module outputs a logic high when the input voltage is below the threshold
module voltage_sensor (
    input [3:0] voltage_in,
    output reg voltage_ok
);
    always @(*) begin
        if (voltage_in > 4'b0011) // 3 in binary
            voltage_ok = 1'b1;    // Voltage is above threshold
        else
            voltage_ok = 1'b0;    // Voltage is below threshold
    end
endmodule

params_used.custom_text: // This module outputs a logic high when the input voltage is below the threshold
